headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Welltower, Lowers Price Target to $232
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Welltower (NYSE:WELL) with a Sector Outperform and lowers the price target from $248 to $232.

headline: REITs: Cheap, Unloved, And Finally Showing Life
summary: REITs in 2026 are defying rising yields as fundamentals, M&A, NOI growth, and dividend hikes drive returns.
